name: Mike's Auto Repair
diag_fee_text: Our diagnostic fee starts at $125. This covers a full inspection and diagnostic scan.
services_text: General repair, brakes, AC, suspension, diagnostics, oil changes, tune-ups, and electrical
makes_serviced_text: All makes and models — domestic and import
tow_policy_text: We can arrange a tow through our partner service. Tow fees depend on distance. If your vehicle is within 10 miles, we offer a $75 flat-rate tow.
banned_promises: Do not quote specific repair prices
